text:
ありがとう！
わあ、ずっしり重たいわね。
食べごたえがありそう！

カフェに足を運んでくれるみんなも
これならきっと満足してくれるわね。
うふふ、腕が鳴るわ。

あなたもぜひ食べに来て！
じゃ

Wonderful, thank you! Whoof, this is pretty
hefty. Looks like it'll make a filling dish!

I can just tell this'll be a winner with the
cafe patrons. My chef's fingers are itching to
get in there!
And don't forget to come give it a try yourself!
